description_long: This is a modern video game controller, most likely a PlayStation 5 DualSense controller, featuring a sleek, ergonomic design with a predominantly white front and black rear. The front face includes a large central touchpad, four directional buttons on the left, and four iconic PlayStation symbol buttons on the right. Two analog sticks are symmetrically placed below the buttons, with a central PlayStation logo button and additional small buttons for options and sharing. The top edge houses two pairs of shoulder buttons (L1/L2 and R1/R2), and the grips are contoured for comfortable handheld use. The rear is mostly black, with a smooth, slightly matte finish, and the overall build suggests a combination of hard plastic and internal electronic components. This controller is designed for wireless operation and is commonly used in home or urban recreational environments.
description: A sleek, ergonomic PlayStation-style game controller with a white front, black rear, touchpad, analog sticks, and iconic button layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the touchpad, analog sticks, D-pad, PlayStation symbol buttons, and central PlayStation logo button.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the contoured grip, shoulder buttons, and the profile of the analog sticks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth black back, shoulder buttons, and the ergonomic shape of the handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other grip, shoulder buttons, and the side profile of the controller.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, touchpad, analog sticks, triggers
